overall.description: Nighttime walk through a residential urban neighborhood in a game engine environment (GTA V style), featuring warm streetlight illumination, apartment buildings, bus stops, and construction scaffolding. The camera moves smoothly along sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes various urban elements typical of a Los Santos residential area.

large green metal utility box on sidewalk

tall street lamps casting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk at night, passing utility poles and electrical boxes. The camera approaches an illuminated bus shelter with a bright advertisement display. Streetlights cast warm yellow light on the concrete pavement while apartment buildings with lit windows line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and turning corner

events.description: black sedan drives past on the street while crossing
turns right onto new sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at intersection and turns right onto opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: red and gray postal mailboxes on sidewalk
white painted crosswalk lines on asphalt road

segments.scene_description: Passing the bus shelter and mailboxes, then crossing the asphalt street at an intersection. A black car drives past as the camera turns right onto the opposite sidewalk. The ground transitions from concrete to asphalt crosswalk and back to concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with construction scaffolding and parked cars

events.description: passing under construction scaffolding on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing parked cars and construction area

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles along the curb

yellow and green real estate sign with phone number
landscaping with red flowers in front of building

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past parked cars and a construction area with metal scaffolding. A For Rent sign and red flowering bushes appear on the right side. The path narrows as the camera moves under the scaffolding structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with traffic barriers and dumpster

events.description: waiting at red traffic light at intersection
traffic light turns green, begins crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaches intersection, waits for light, then crosses the street

entered.detail: street intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks
orange and white plastic construction barriers
overhead traffic signal showing red then green

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection with orange traffic barriers and a green dumpster. The camera waits at a red traffic light before crossing as the signal turns green. The scene opens into a wider intersection with crosswalk markings and distant streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential neighborhood at night, transitioning from a sidewalk lined with apartments to a wide urban intersection. It begins by gliding past utility poles and lit apartment windows, moving toward the bright glow of an illuminated bus shelter. As the camera passes the shelter and mailboxes, it crosses an asphalt street behind a passing black car before turning right back onto the concrete pavement. The path then leads past parked cars and red flowering bushes, narrowing as the camera moves beneath the metal framework of construction scaffolding. Finally, the scene opens up at a street intersection where the camera pauses by orange barriers and a green dumpster, waiting for a red light to turn green before crossing into the wider, streetlight-lit junction.
